category_sources: Official Snyk docs describe Snyk CLI as bringing Snyk scanning into the development workflow.
source_facts.description says it scans and monitors projects for security vulnerabilities.
display_name_sources: Official Snyk documentation page title is Snyk CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points users to the CLI documentation for detailed information.
Official Snyk docs provide the Snyk CLI documentation, command reference, and install/update guide.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README describes the Snyk CLI and links to Snyk support/docs.

tags_sources: Official Snyk CLI documentation and GitHub README describe open source, code, container, and IaC scanning workflows.
